metadata.description: Official CockroachDB plugin for Claude Code

plugins.name: cockroachdb
plugins.description: Connect Claude Code directly to your CockroachDB clusters for hands-on database work — explore schemas, write optimized SQL, debug queries, and manage distributed database clusters. This plugin provides tools across MCP backends (self-hosted MCP Toolbox and managed CockroachDB Cloud MCP Server), specialized agents (DBA, Developer, Operator), skills across operational domains, and built-in safety hooks.
